content.text: Good, the namespace exists. Now I'll deploy everything in the correct order: Secrets → headless Service → StatefulSet → initialize the replica set → create users.

input.command:
# Generate a random keyfile for replica set internal auth
KEYFILE=$(openssl rand -base64 756)
kubectl create secret generic mongodb-keyfile \
  --from-literal=keyfile="$KEYFILE" \
  -n mongodb --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -

kubectl create secret generic admin-user-password \
  --from-literal=password=admin123password \
  -n mongodb --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -

kubectl create secret generic app-user-password \
  --from-literal=password=app123password \
  -n mongodb --dry-run=client -o yaml | kubectl apply -f -
input.description: Create admin and app user password secrets

input.content:
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongodb
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-keyfile-perms
          image: busybox:1.36
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              cp /keyfile-secret/keyfile /keyfile/keyfile
              chmod 400 /keyfile/keyfile
              chown 999:999 /keyfile/keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-secret
              mountPath: /keyfile-secret
              readOnly: true
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongodb
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
            - --replSet=mongodb-replica
            - --bind_ip_all
            - --keyFile=/etc/mongodb/keyfile
            - --auth
          ports:
            - containerPort: 27017
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - "db.adminCommand('ping').ok"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 6
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              memory: 512Mi
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 1Gi

input.command:
cat > /tmp/mongodb-deploy.yaml << 'EOF'
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica-svc
  namespace: mongodb
  labels:
    app: mongodb-replica
spec:
  clusterIP: None
  selector:
    app: mongodb-replica
  ports:
    - name: mongodb
      port: 27017
      targetPort: 27017
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: mongodb-replica
  namespace: mongodb
spec:
  serviceName: mongodb-replica-svc
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: mongodb-replica
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: mongodb-replica
    spec:
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
      initContainers:
        - name: fix-keyfile-perms
          image: busybox:1.36
          command:
            - sh
            - -c
            - |
              cp /keyfile-secret/keyfile /keyfile/keyfile
              chmod 400 /keyfile/keyfile
              chown 999:999 /keyfile/keyfile
          volumeMounts:
            - name: keyfile-secret
              mountPath: /keyfile-secret
              readOnly: true
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /keyfile
      containers:
        - name: mongodb
          image: mongo:6.0
          command:
            - mongod
            - --replSet=mongodb-replica
            - --bind_ip_all
            - --keyFile=/etc/mongodb/keyfile
            - --auth
          ports:
            - containerPort: 27017
          volumeMounts:
            - name: data
              mountPath: /data/db
            - name: keyfile
              mountPath: /etc/mongodb
          readinessProbe:
            exec:
              command:
                - mongosh
                - --quiet
                - --eval
                - "db.adminCommand('ping').ok"
            initialDelaySeconds: 10
            periodSeconds: 5
            timeoutSeconds: 5
            failureThreshold: 6
          resources:
            requests:
              cpu: 100m
              memory: 256Mi
            limits:
              memory: 512Mi
      volumes:
        - name: keyfile-secret
          secret:
            secretName: mongodb-keyfile
        - name: keyfile
          emptyDir: {}
  volumeClaimTemplates:
    - metadata:
        name: data
      spec:
        accessModes: [ReadWriteOnce]
        resources:
          requests:
            storage: 1Gi
EOF
echo "written"
input.description: Write MongoDB StatefulSet and Service manifest

content.text: Now wait for all 3 pods to be Running and Ready before initializing the replica set.

input.command:
# Wait for all 3 pods to be Running
echo "Waiting for pods to be ready..."
for i in 0 1 2; do
  kubectl wait pod/mongodb-replica-$i -n mongodb \
    --for=condition=Ready --timeout=300s
  echo "Pod mongodb-replica-$i is Ready"
done
input.description: Wait for all 3 MongoDB pods to be Ready

input.command:
# Poll until pod-1 and pod-2 actually exist and are Ready
echo "Polling for all 3 pods..."
while true; do
  READY=$(kubectl get pods -n mongodb -l app=mongodb-replica \
    --field-selector=status.phase=Running \
    -o jsonpath='{.items[*].status.conditions[?(@.type=="Ready")].status}' 2>/dev/null)
  COUNT=$(echo "$READY" | tr ' ' '\n' | grep -c "True" || true)
  echo "Ready pods: $COUNT/3"
  if [ "$COUNT" -ge 3 ]; then
    echo "All 3 pods ready"
    break
  fi
  sleep 10
done
kubectl get pods -n mongodb

input.command:
# Wait for PRIMARY to elect (poll rs.status())
echo "Waiting for PRIMARY election..."
for attempt in $(seq 1 30); do
  STATE=$(kubectl exec -n mongodb mongodb-replica-0 -- mongosh --quiet --eval \
    'rs.status().members.filter(m => m.stateStr === "PRIMARY").length' 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  echo "Attempt $attempt: PRIMARY count = $STATE"
  if [ "$STATE" = "1" ]; then
    echo "PRIMARY elected"
    break
  fi
  sleep 5
done
